description: Build the admin package with super admin dashboard, user management, moderation, monitoring, feature flags, config management, incident management, deployments, migrations, jobs, alerts, audit trail, revenue dashboard, and support tickets
steps: Create packages/admin/src/types.ts with all interfaces: AdminUser, UserSearchQuery, UserAction, ContentModerationItem, ModerationPriority, SystemHealth, UptimeRecord, ErrorRate, LatencyMetric, FeatureFlag, FlagType, RolloutConfig, ABVariant, TargetingRule, LiveConfig, ConfigChange, Incident, IncidentSeverity, IncidentStatus, PostMortem, Deployment, DeploymentStrategy, CanaryMetrics, MetricsGate, Migration, MigrationStatus, BackgroundJob, JobStatus, JobQueue, AlertRule, AlertCondition, AlertSeverity, AnomalyConfig, AuditEntry, AuditAction, RevenueMetrics, SubscriptionMetrics, SupportTicket, TicketStatus, TicketPriority, SLAConfig

Create packages/admin/src/core/admin-dashboard.ts - Super admin dashboard service: system overview, active users, resource utilization, recent activity feed, quick actions, admin permissions with RBAC

Create packages/admin/src/core/user-management.ts - Full user management: search with filters, view profiles, edit details, suspend/ban/verify accounts, impersonate users (with audit trail), bulk operations, export user data

Create packages/admin/src/core/content-moderation.ts - Moderation queue with priority scoring based on report count/severity/content type, auto-detection flags, reviewer assignment, appeal handling, moderation statistics

Create packages/admin/src/core/system-health.ts - System health monitoring: uptime tracking per service, error rate calculation with time windows, p50/p95/p99 latency tracking, dependency health checks, degradation alerts

Create packages/admin/src/core/feature-flags.ts - Feature flags system: boolean flags, percentage rollout (0-100%), user targeting by ID/segment/attribute, A/B test variants with traffic splitting, gradual rollout schedules, kill switches

Create packages/admin/src/core/config-manager.ts - Live configuration management: update settings without deployment, config versioning with rollback, environment-specific configs, config validation, change notifications, encrypted secrets

Create packages/admin/src/core/incident-manager.ts - Incident management: declare incidents with severity (P0-P4), assign responders, status updates timeline, auto-notify stakeholders, resolution tracking, post-mortem template generation

Create packages/admin/src/core/deployment-manager.ts - Deployment management: blue-green deployments, canary releases with metrics gates (error rate < 1%, latency p99 < 500ms), instant rollback, deployment history, approval workflows

Create packages/admin/src/core/migration-runner.ts - Database migration runner: create migration files with timestamps, up/down execution, migration status tracking, dry-run mode, batch execution, rollback on failure

Create packages/admin/src/core/job-monitor.ts - Background job monitor: view all queues, active/waiting/failed/dead counts, retry failed jobs, kill stuck jobs, job history, performance metrics per queue

Create packages/admin/src/core/alert-engine.ts - Alert rules engine: threshold-based alerts (metric > value for duration), anomaly detection using z-score (configurable sensitivity), alert routing to channels, snooze/acknowledge/resolve

Create packages/admin/src/core/audit-trail.ts - Immutable audit trail: log all admin actions, search by actor/action/target/time, tamper-evident hashing (chain each entry to previous hash), export for compliance, retention policies

Create packages/admin/src/core/revenue-dashboard.ts - Revenue dashboard: real-time revenue tracking, subscription metrics (new/churned/expanded), refund tracking, revenue by plan/region/channel, forecasting with trend analysis

Create packages/admin/src/core/support-tickets.ts - Support ticket system: create tickets from user reports, assign to agents, respond with templates, escalation rules, SLA tracking (first response time, resolution time), customer satisfaction scores
Create packages/admin/src/index.ts barrel exporting all 14 core modules and types
acceptance_criteria: packages/admin/src/index.ts exports all 14 core modules and types
Feature flags support boolean, percentage, user targeting, and A/B variants
Audit trail uses cryptographic chaining for tamper evidence
Deployment manager supports blue-green and canary with metrics gates
All files have proper TypeScript type annotations
